    {
        public bool IsFailure { get; }
        public bool IsSuccess { get; }
        public PolarSharp.Result<TResult, TError> Bind<TResult>(System.Func<TValue, PolarSharp.Result<TResult, TError>> binder) { }

        public PolarSharp.Result<TResult, TError> Map<TResult>(System.Func<TValue, TResult> mapper) { }
        public TResult Match<TResult>(System.Func<TValue, TResult> onSuccess, System.Func<TError, TResult> onFailure) { }
        public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResult> MatchAsync<TResult>(System.Func<TValue, System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResult>> onSuccess, System.Func<TError, System.Threading.Tasks.Task<TResult>> onFailure) { }
        public override string ToString() { }
        public static PolarSharp.Result<TValue, TError> Failure(TError error) { }
        public static PolarSharp.Result<TValue, TError> Success(TValue value) { }
    }

    public enum BenefitType
    {
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="custom")]
        Custom = 0,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="discord")]
        Discord = 1,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="github_repository")]
        Github_repository = 2,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="downloadables")]
        Downloadables = 3,

    public enum CheckoutStatus
    {
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="open")]
        Open = 0,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="expired")]
        Expired = 1,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="confirmed")]
        Confirmed = 2,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="succeeded")]
        Succeeded = 3,
        [System.Runtime.Serialization.EnumMember(Value="failed")]
        Failed = 4,
    }
